recent_changes.description: Fixed Homepage and Lookbook tabs missing $is_super condition
Size Guide popup modal on product pages + admin management in Settings tab
Thêm sản phẩm form in products tab with create-new product support
Banner tab was blank - missing $is_super check. Media grid post_mime_type fixed
wp.media activeMode crash - fixed with try-catch, fallback to static file input
Added wp_enqueue_media() and admin CSS/JS enqueue to page-admin.php
Product inline editor (Sửa button) + save product via AJAX

errors_encountered.cause: JS conflict on frontend - media-views.min.js crashes
errors_encountered.solution: try-catch around wp.media() call; fallback to #kadProductImageInput click

errors_encountered.error: Admin panel tabs blank for WP Administrator
errors_encountered.cause: elseif conditions only checked custom kieu_* capabilities

errors_encountered.error: Media grid empty despite images in WP Media

decisions_made.decision: wp.media try-catch with static file input fallback
decisions_made.reason: Frontend wp.media has JS conflicts; file input approach always works

decisions_made.decision: Two separate static file inputs: #kadProductImageInput and #kadGeneralImageInput
decisions_made.reason: Prevents event handler conflicts between product picker and general picker

decisions_made.decision: product_id=0 in kieu_save_product creates new product
decisions_made.reason: Reuses existing AJAX handler instead of creating a separate create handler

decisions_made.decision: Size Guide uses uploaded image OR default HTML table fallback
decisions_made.reason: Zero configuration required; default table shows XS-XL size data immediately
